---
title: "Life Expectancy and GDP per Capita"
---

## Introduction

This page explores how life expectancy changes as GDP per capita increases, using the Gapminder dataset.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Load dataset
df = pd.read_csv("gapminder.csv")

# Check column names
df.columns

``` 


```{python}
# Scatter plot: GDP per capita vs Life expectancy
plt.figure()
plt.scatter(df["gdp_per_capita"], df["life_expectancy"])
plt.xlabel("GDP per Capita")
plt.ylabel("Life Expectancy")
plt.title("Life Expectancy vs GDP per Capita")
plt.show()

``` 

## Interpretation

The scatterplot suggests that as GDP per capita increases, life expectancy tends to increase as well. The relationship flattens for higher-income countries. This indicates diminishing returns at higher GDP levels.
